agentAbility.name: Grand Slam
agentAbility.description: Calls in a massive bomb strike after a delay. The bomb penetrates objects and detonates underground, creating a seismic blast wave that pushes enemies back.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Demolition Charges
tankAbilities.description: Launch two 28 cm rockets in a ballistic arc; warheads deal heavy explosive damage and apply Slowed.

tankAbilities.name: Minefield
tankAbilities.description: Deploys a minefield that stalls opponents by damaging and Immobilizing them.
